siteMetadata.title: SuperCoolNeato
siteMetadata.description: a few of my favorite things

nodes.excerpt: Duke Ellington - Piano Solo B.B. King - The Anthology 2 Ella Fitzgerald - The Essential I Ella Fitzgerald - The Essential II Ella Fitzgerald - The Essential III

Summer has been lingering in NYC, but I've attempted to bring on the fall with some blues. Jolie Holland Billie Holiday - The Collection I B.B. King Anthology I Also, a couple old favorites just released some great new music: The Avalanches - Wildflower Kishi Bashi - Sonderlust

I spent the past month with my head down working on a rather taxing project, so my recent listening choices are even more chilled out than usual for maximum concentration. This month, I'm linking to Waterloo Records, because I'm missing Austin although not missing the heat. Beasts of the Southern…
